name: character-image
description: Generates consistent Walter Whiskers character images using Flux Kontext Pro. Supports optional input_image for character reference consistency across scenes.

dynamic_params.1.prompt: Scene-specific prompt describing Walter's pose, expression, and background for each scene
dynamic_params.1.aspect_ratio: Switch between 16:9 and 9:16 depending on output format
dynamic_params.1.seed: Change per scene or keep fixed for consistency
dynamic_params.1.input_image: (optional) Reference image of Walter from a previous generation to maintain character consistency

expected_inputs.input_image: Optional — previously generated Walter image for character reference locking

expected_outputs.images: PNG image of Walter Whiskers in the specified scene

notes.partner_api: Requires extra_data.api_key_comfy_org in workflow submission to ComfyUI Cloud
notes.character_consistency: For multi-scene consistency, generate scene 1 first, then pass that output as input_image to subsequent scenes
notes.alternative_node: FluxKontextMaxImageNode available as higher-quality alternative with same interface
